Title: The Rise and Fall of American Growth: The U.S. Standard of Living since the Civil War (The Princeton Economic History of the Western World)
Author: Robert J. Gordon
My Review:
The first third of the book on developments up to 1940 is detailed and interesting. I found it exhilarating. I thought the chapters on recent technological improvements such as modern computers were not as strong though still good. I mostly skipped the final section of the book which theorizes about the factors behind the slowdown of growth post-1970.

I highly recommmend the first section of the book.

Title: Where Is My Flying Car?: A Memoir of Future Past
Author: J. Storrs Hall
My Review:
Poorly written, terribly organized, non-existent editing.
The content in the chapter on transportation is poor and lacking basic contextual knowledge about public transportation.
I skipped around and only read a few sections of the book. It may be that the rest of the book has many interesting ideas, I will read them when they are in presentable form.
